title: 3D sabres ⚔️
description: Replaces standard Minecraft swords with high-quality 3D sabre models.
body:
This texture pack is designed to replace the classic pixelated swords we all know and are familiar with, allowing you to have 3d sabres in your game. It includes all material variations: wood, stone, iron, gold, diamond, netherite, and more recently, copper. 
It works from version 1.21 onwards.

-Does not require Optifine.

-Vanilla like.
